content.en:
Ye Tian took the robbery order and came to the resource exchange office of the Tianfeng Sea Branch, where any treasure can be exchanged as long as there is a contribution value.

Of course, high-level members can only exchange treasures that can only be exchanged by high-level members, and there are some things that can only be exchanged by members above the elite level, which cannot be exchanged by high-level members.

The Body Robbery Order does not require any contribution points, and can be exchanged for any Body Robbery cultivation method.

Ye Tian browsed through a door to rob the body cultivation method-

The Rising Sun!

The Golden Spirit robs the body!

Eternal Destruction!

Stormfall!

The catalog of the one-door body robbery cultivation method was crossed by Ye Tian's browsing, most of the body robbery methods were relatively ordinary, but the cultivation difficulty was low, the danger was low, and the resources required were few, so it was easy to practice.

On the other hand, it is extremely difficult to get started, and it is even more difficult to improve, even if it is a demon genius, it is very likely that in the end, it is very likely that it will not be able to perfectly cultivate the body robbery to the consummation realm, so that it will be forced to be promoted, resulting in an incomplete body robbery.

Therefore, the best robbery is the right one, and the more powerful the better.

Ye Tian naturally understood this truth, but he would not choose an ordinary body robbery, but would choose a very powerful and suitable body robbery cultivation method.

After a long time, Ye Tian had browsed all the body robbery methods of the Heavenly Wind Sea.

"Let's choose this one!"

Ye Tian stared at the method called Wanyuan Returning to the Ruins and robbing the body, and immediately exchanged this method of robbing the body with the body robbery order.

When Ye Tian came out of the Body Robbery Method, Long He came over and asked, "Ye Tian, which Body Robbery Method have you exchanged?"

"Ten Thousand Sources Return to Ruins!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

"What, you actually chose this method of robbing the body?" Long He was shocked.

Wanyuan Guiru is known as one of the three major tribulations of the Heavenly Wind Sea, it seems to be very awesome, but it is too difficult to cultivate, even the descendants of first-class invincible people may not dare to cultivate.

The entry of Wanyuan Ruins requires that you must be proficient in a variety of rules, you need to understand the rules of one foreign world after another, and at the same time, you need countless blood raids, and it cannot be the same kind of blood, but the robberies of different exotic worlds, after all, the blood raids also contain the rules of an exotic world.

The most terrifying thing is that the cultivation speed of Wanyuan Guiru is too slow, at least one-tenth of the progress of other body tribulations, or even lower.

Moreover, this body-robbing cultivation method will fall into shackles at every turn, and it is easy to go mad, causing the physical body to collapse.

The reason why this is so is because this method of cultivating the body is somewhat incomplete, mainly because the creator has not cultivated it.

In fact, those top-notch body robbery cultivation methods are more or less flawed, because there are too few invincible cultivators, which makes it difficult to perfect them, and every invincible person's body is not necessarily, so the flaws are naturally different.

Therefore, to cultivate the top body robbery cultivation method, you must rely on your own exploration and perfection.

However, how many invincible people were able to finally cultivate the top body robbery cultivation method to the consummation realm?

"That's right, I decided to cultivate the Ten Thousand Sources to Return to the Ruins!" Ye Tian affirmed.

Long He persuaded and said: "Ye Tian, don't you look at the strength of the Wanyuan Guiru, but the difficulty and flaws of cultivation, do you understand? It is better to cultivate an ordinary body robbery cultivation method, maybe it is not as good as this kind of top-notch body robbery, but it is better to be safe, and there is still a lot of cultivation experience to provide, so you will not go the wrong way!"

Ye Tian shook his head and said, "Lord Longhe, I have already decided, and besides, I have confidence!"

Seeing this, Long He no longer dissuaded.

As for Ye Tian's confidence, he didn't believe it.

Ye Tian joined the Heavenly Wind Sea, not only became a high-level member all of a sudden, but also obtained a mansion as a residence, in the Absolute Martial City, if you want to get a mansion, the price is not low, you can't buy it without 100,000 origin rules robbery crystals.

Subsequently, Ye Tian renamed this mansion Ye Mansion, and he cultivated here.

The purpose of his coming here is to comprehend the rules of the Tianlin Realm, so as to comprehend an invincible ancestral technique, so there is no difference between copying the body and the body, once the copying body creates an invincible ancestral technique, it is also equivalent to the creation of the body.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to inherit the invincible method of robbing the body of Wanyuan Guiru, and accepted it for a long time before finally accepting the inheritance.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's body began to cultivate the Ten Thousand Sources Returning to the Ruins, but with this cultivation, Ye Tian felt the difficulty of cultivating this body.

He had been cultivating for a full year of penance, and he had made little progress.

"It seems that a large amount of blood robbery must be used in order to make the rapid progress of Wanyuan Guiru!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, Wanyuan Guiru has some remnants, for the sake of safety, he must also let the copy body cultivate and improve it step by step, so the amount of blood robbery required is probably more.

In other words, if you are an ordinary person, you can't get so much blood robbery at all.

But Ye Tian still had the hope of obtaining a large amount of blood.

However, using blood robbery to cultivate is actually not the best way, blood robbery is mild, and the value is expensive, but in fact, the robbery power contained in the blood robbery is not very exaggerated, and there are many treasures that contain more robbery power than blood robbery, but the robbery power in those treasures is extremely chaotic, and it is not suitable for invincible people to refine.

However, Ye Tian possessed the Eternal Talent Tribulation and the Secret Technique of Transforming the Tribulation, so he could refine the power of the Violent Tribulation.

Therefore, he was ready to hunt and kill the robbing beasts, exchanging the robbery blood for those resources that contained the power of the berserk robbery, which was the most reasonable way to cultivate.

And there is this kind of resource inside the Tianfeng Sea, and it is the best robbery stone.

The robbery stones that Ye Tian traded before were only ordinary low-grade robbery stones, and on top of the ordinary lower-grade robbery stones, there were middle-grade robbery stones, high-grade robbery stones, and top-grade robbery stones.

Among them, the tribulation power contained in the best robbery stone is even higher than that of the thousand tribulation blood, but the internal robbery power is too chaotic for the invincible to use, so the value of the best robbery stone is only about twenty tribulation blood.

And so.

Ye Tian came to the Tianfeng Sea branch and directly exchanged the thirty tribulation blood rewarded by the Tianfeng Sea for the best tribulation stones, and exchanged them for three.

For Ye Tian, these three top-grade robbery stones are equivalent to three thousand-year-old tribulation blood, and their value is unimaginable.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's copy body uses a top-grade robbery stone to cultivate the Ten Thousand Sources Return to the Ruins, if there is any defect, he can at least improve it in time, and it will not affect the main body.

In this way, Ye Tian began his formal cultivation of Wanyuan Guiru.
